def positive_db_connection_pool_size_exceeds_server_max_connections():
    rule_id = "db_connection_pool_size_exceeds_server_max_connections"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Database connection pool max_overflow or pool_size configured above the database server's max_connections."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
